item.title: My Collections
item.description: Ukulele *2 1.no brand Ukulele 2.OHANA CK-10 acoustic guitar YAMAHA FG800 electric guitar Fender Player Telecaster electric bass Mint Green, Fender Musicmaster 1997 bass Daphne Blue, Sterling by Music Man Short Scale StingRay bass amp Fender Rumble 15

item.title: no content about in this directory yet"
item.description: Hello my friend! Since I just lauch my blog, I have no blog articles about my life yet. I’m really sorry about that. I will update and post more in the future. :)

item.title: About Me
item.description: Basic infos age: 22 year old gender: female, current cs student B.A. in English at Nanjing University(but suffer from studying liberal arts) a mediocre musickmaker and guitar/bass player What I like Cat! Love all the cats. My dream is to open a shelter to help stray cats find a lovely home
